5986c0f3.name: Why Do We Dream?
5986c0f3.description: A synthesis of current scientific understanding of dream function.

test.assumption: Memory consolidation is the primary function of REM dreaming.
test.test_method: Cross-reference 15+ peer-reviewed papers. Find consensus and dissent.
test.success_criteria: ≥10 independent studies support the consolidation mechanism.
test.failure_criteria: Majority of studies show no correlation.

28675d0b.name: Async Decision Framework
28675d0b.description: A structured process for making team decisions asynchronously without meetings.

test.assumption: Teams can reach decisions 40% faster without synchronous meetings.
test.test_method: Apply to 5 real decisions at current org. Measure time-to-decision vs last quarter.
test.result_notes: Average improvement: 41%. One decision took longer due to conflict.

28675d0b.execution_notes: Deployed org-wide. Now standard process. Documented in handbook.

1100e901.name: Internal API Gateway
1100e901.description: Unified API gateway to replace 7 separate service endpoints in the platform.

test.assumption: A unified gateway can handle all 7 service contracts without breaking changes.
test.test_method: Build prototype supporting 3 services. Run regression tests against production traffic replay.
test.success_criteria: Zero breaking changes on 3 services. Latency ≤ +5ms.

f806023d.name: Algorithmic Audit Mandate
f806023d.description: Require public audits of AI systems used in hiring decisions.
f806023d.verdict_action: Don't invest resources. Run a cheap test on the weakest dimension first.
f806023d.kill_reason: RISKY — Legislative pathway scored 0. No institutional standing. Rebuild with a coalition first.

08add6e5.name: Graph Coloring Bound Conjecture
08add6e5.description: A conjectured tighter bound on chromatic numbers for sparse planar graphs.
08add6e5.verdict_action: Identify the weak dimension. Resolve it before proceeding.

test.assumption: The bound holds for all planar graphs with average degree < 3.
test.test_method: Attempt formal proof via discharging method. Check 50 known counterexample candidates.
test.success_criteria: Proof holds for all tested cases with no counterexample found.
test.failure_criteria: Single valid counterexample disproves the bound.

cc505ed4.name: Microplastics & Gut Permeability
cc505ed4.description: Hypothesis: repeated ingestion of 10µm microplastics increases intestinal permeability in rodents.

test.assumption: 10µm particles cross the intestinal epithelium and increase permeability markers.
test.test_method: Randomized controlled trial in 60 rats. Measure FITC-dextran flux at 4 and 8 weeks.
test.success_criteria: ≥25% increase in permeability markers vs control, p<0.05.
test.result_notes: 32% increase. p=0.021. Replicated in second cohort.

cc505ed4.execution_notes: Submitted to Nature Microbiology. Under review.

9831979d.name: Moral Obligation Without Free Will
9831979d.description: Thesis: moral obligation remains coherent even under hard determinism.

test.assumption: The concept of 'could have done otherwise' is not required for moral responsibility.
test.test_method: Test argument against Frankfurt cases and Strawson's reactive attitudes framework.
test.success_criteria: Argument survives both without requiring compatibilist assumptions.
test.failure_criteria: Either framework exposes an irresolvable contradiction in the thesis.
test.result_notes: Survived Frankfurt cases. Strawson required one qualification but did not defeat the thesis.

9831979d.execution_notes: Published in Philosophy Quarterly. 8 citations in 6 months.

4e460b89.name: FreightMatch AI
4e460b89.description: Match empty truck return legs with SME shippers to cut deadhead costs.

test.assumption: SME shippers will book through a zero-fee platform for a 15% rate reduction.
test.test_method: Cold outreach to 30 shippers. Track booking rate.
test.success_criteria: ≥12/30 shippers complete at least one booking.

4e460b89.execution_notes: v1 live. 3 paying lanes. $40K GMV in first month.

0c7c54a7.name: Proof-First Calculus
0c7c54a7.description: Teach limits and derivatives through proof construction before formula application.

test.assumption: Students taught proof-first retain derivative rules better after 6 weeks.
test.test_method: Split 40 students. Group A: traditional. Group B: proof-first. Test at week 6.
test.success_criteria: Group B scores ≥15% higher on unseen problem set.
test.failure_criteria: No significant difference or Group A scores higher.

9778b7ab.name: Zero-Copy Event Bus
9778b7ab.description: In-process event bus using memory-mapped buffers to eliminate serialization overhead.

test.assumption: Zero-copy delivery reduces inter-service latency by ≥60% vs JSON serialization.
test.test_method: Benchmark: 1M messages/sec on identical hardware. Measure P99 latency.

9778b7ab.execution_notes: Deployed to production. Replaced Redis pub/sub in 4 services.

ed25e528.name: Default-On Privacy Settings
ed25e528.description: Claim: opt-out privacy defaults reduce data sharing by >60% vs opt-in.

test.assumption: Users share 60%+ less data under opt-out defaults than opt-in.
test.test_method: A/B test on 10,000 users. Measure data-sharing consent rates.

78bdaa88.name: The Memory Architect
78bdaa88.description: A novel told entirely through objects — no dialogue, no narration, only artifact descriptions.

test.assumption: Readers will follow a complete narrative arc through objects alone.
test.test_method: Share 3-chapter prototype with 20 readers. Measure chapter completion rate.
test.result_notes: 17/20 completed. 3 asked when the full book releases.

78bdaa88.execution_notes: Full manuscript completed. Submitted to 6 literary agents.
